ValidationRule.description: Verifies required fields are populated when Stage is Proposal Presented for Core services.
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: NOT( OR(RecordType.Name = "Optum Sales Opportunity", RecordType.Name = "Consulting Services Sales", RecordType.Name = "Primary Care Opportunity", RecordType.Name = "Patient Engagement Opportunity", RecordType.Name = "SNF - Skilled Nursing Facility", RecordType.Name = "AL - Assisted Living Facility", RecordType.Name = "eMAC Sales Opportunity")) && ISPICKVAL(StageName, "Proposal Presented") && (ISPICKVAL(Data_Extract_Received__c,"")|| ISNULL(Proposal_Financial_Terms__c) || ISNULL(Proposal_Date__c)|| ISNULL(Revenue__c)|| ISNULL(Margin__c)|| ISNULL(Volume__c)|| ISNULL(Subsidy__c))
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Required Fields: Proposal Financial Terms, Data Extract Received, Proposal Date, Patient Collections, Total Margin, Annual Encounters, and Subsidy.
